text: I enjoy thinking about new ideas and concepts.
I like visiting art galleries or museums.
I prefer following a familiar routine rather than trying new things.
I have a vivid imagination.
I am not interested in abstract or philosophical discussions.
I enjoy exploring creative ways to solve problems.
I prefer practical facts over theoretical ideas.
I enjoy learning about different cultures and perspectives.
I rarely spend time daydreaming or reflecting on life.
I appreciate beauty in art, music, or nature.
I keep my workspace neat and organized.
I often make decisions on impulse without planning ahead.
I pay attention to small details in my work.
I find it difficult to stick to a schedule.
I always finish the tasks that I start.
I sometimes procrastinate or delay doing important work.
I set clear goals for myself and work hard to achieve them.
I am often careless and make mistakes.
I show up on time for appointments and meetings.
I like to think carefully before I speak or act.
I feel energized after spending time with a group of people.
I prefer to spend my free time alone or in quiet settings.
I find it easy to start conversations with strangers.
I tend to keep my thoughts and feelings to myself.
I love being the center of attention in a social gathering.
I am quiet and reserved around people I do not know well.
I actively seek out social events and parties.
I find large social gatherings draining.
I make friends quickly and easily.
I talk a lot when I am with friends.
I make an effort to help others when they are in need.
I sometimes insult or speak harshly to other people.
I try to understand and sympathize with others' feelings.
I believe that most people have good intentions.
I find it hard to forgive people who have wronged me.
I am a good listener and show interest in other people's lives.
I often get into arguments or disputes with others.
I put other people's needs before my own.
I don't really care about other people's problems.
I treat everyone I meet with kindness and respect.
I get stressed or overwhelmed easily.
I feel calm and relaxed even under pressure.
I worry frequently about things that might go wrong.
I experience frequent mood swings.
I rarely feel sad, blue, or depressed.
I get irritated or frustrated very quickly.
I feel comfortable with who I am.
I often feel insecure or self-conscious.
I find it easy to bounce back after a setback.
I am easily bothered or upset by small things.
